questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The North Castle Conservation Board currently lists 8 named members/officers: Jane Black (Co-Chair, term expires April 10, 2026), John Krupa (Co-Chair, term expires December 31, 2026), Adam Barnett (Member, May 14, 2027), Craig Benedict (Member, April 23, 2027), George Drapeau (Member, April 10, 2026), Vincent Giordano (Member, October 10, 2026), Erin McCaffrey Nenadich (Member, October 23, 2026), and Julie Mucker (Secretary). Councilman Jose Berra serves as Town Board Liaison. The total number of authorized seats and any vacancies are not specified in the provided sources.
questions.gap: The source lists current members but does not state the total number of authorized seats or identify any vacancies. Full alignment with best practice would require explicit disclosure of authorized seat count and vacancy status.
